themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "The peace offering (שְׁלָמִים, shelamim) celebrated fellowship with God and community, with p...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְהִקְרִ֥יב: If he offer - to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose".

1: you are to present before the Lord an animal without defect
6: you are to offer a male or female without defect
7: If you offer a lamb, you are to present it...
